title: New Minecraft
description: The First Mod that I have ever made using MCreator, hope you like it!
body:
# Welcome to the New Minecraft Mod!
This mod is my first Minecraft mod made with MCreator, This mod is in the early stages of development meaning that some things may be placeholders for the future (like the villager profession added). This mod includes:

- Amber Wood
- Amber Forest Biome
- Rubies
- A miner villager profession
- New blocks
- New picture
  And there is more to come in the future!

If you have any inquires or have any problems with the mod, join the discord and I can try to assist with any problems with the mod:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RctX6GFkjV)

Don't forget that this mod is in its alpha stages and things are subject to change in the future!
